headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) Passes Another Regulatory Hurdle For Three Mile Island Nuclear Plant
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the 10 Stocks That Can Still Skyrocket On The Neo Cloud Boom. Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the energy companies solving the power bottleneck that AI infrastructure currently faces. The company’s stock has underperformed the broader market over the last year, but recent analyst sentiment and […]

headline: Cramer Says Credo Technology Is 'Just So Good' — But Warns This Healthcare Name Is A 'Value Trap'
summary: Jim Cramer recommends buying Constellation Energy (CEG) as it has come down too far. ManpowerGroup (MAN) is not a great win. Credo Technology (CRDO) is good. Cramer doesn't want Perrigo (PRGO). Cadence Design (CDNS) is a hold but buy if it comes down.
